wins: Record revenue and profitability with 36% YoY growth
Strong demand across data center AI, server, and PC businesses
Significant growth in EPYC, Ryzen, and Instinct processor sales
Record cloud sales with over 1,350 public EPYC cloud instances
Major partnerships with OpenAI, Oracle, and other hyperscalers
risks: Revenue from MI308 shipments to China excluded from guidance
Potential supply chain constraints for components and interconnects
Uncertainty around customer adoption of MI400 Series and Helios
Competition from other GPU and ASIC vendors for large-scale deployments
Depreciation of GPUs over 5-6 years may affect long-term revenue
